name: Turn Manager handles topic shift
description: When the user does not answer the pending question but introduces a new relevant observation, the system accepts the new observation, defers the pending question, and continues to the next question.

expectations.description: System records a shifted symptom observation
System does not record a no_answer for the pending question; it is deferred
Topic shift is not treated as a failed reprompt
System moves on to the next uncovered question after accepting the shifted topic
